Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Banana Bread

Yield 1 loaf
Preparation time 15m
Cook time 65m
Ingredients
  • Nonstick spray
  • 180g all-purpose flour
  • 1 1/4 tsp baking soda
  • 3/4 tsp kosher salt
  • 220g dark brown sugar
  • 1/3 cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt
  • 55g unsalted butter, softened
  • 2 large eggs
  • 4 large very ripe bananas, mashed (~1.5 cups, ~450g)
Instructions
  1. Preheat oven to 350 F
  2. Lightly coat 8x4 inch bread pan with nonstick spray and line with parchment paper, leaving generous overhang on long sides
  3. Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt
  4. On medium, mix brown sugar, yogurt, and butter until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes
  5. Add eggs one at a time, beating to blend and scraping down sides
  6. On low, add flour mixture and mix until just combined
  7. Add bananas and mix until just combined
  8. Bake 60-65 minutes
  9. Let bread cool completely before slicing
